bodyText:
ADMIN SANDBOX MODE
Borivoje Cvetković Agency Test Sandbox

You are testing this workspace with isolated sandbox data.

Back to Admin
AGENCY WORKSPACE
Borivoje Cvetković Test Agency

One place for every worker profile. Create and edit the full worker form here, then use agency support anytime without leaving the workspace.

CVETKOVICBORIVOJE+TEST-AGENCY@GMAIL.COM

TOTAL
0
READY
0
PAID
0
DRAFTS
0

90-day refund guarantee

If we do not find a job for a worker within 90 days, the $9 Job Finder fee is refunded in full.

Workers

Manage every worker from one board. Agency support stays unlocked the whole time, and Job Finder payment stays one worker at a time so Stripe never charges the wrong total by mistake.

Add worker
No workers yet

Use the Add worker button above to open the full worker form without leaving this workspace.

ADD WORKER
Add worker

Fill the full worker form here without leaving the dashboard. Email and phone stay optional unless the worker should receive notifications.
